if.test: TOTAL_COUNT == null and sort_column_name != null and sort_type != null

when.test: TOTAL_COUNT == null and page != null and limit != null
TOTAL_COUNT == null and page != null and limit == null

mapper.select: SELECT T.TICKET_ID AS TICKET_ID, T.CLUSTER_NO AS CLUSTER_NO, T.TICKET_TYPE AS TICKET_TYPE, T.TICKET_GENERATION_TIME AS TICKET_GENERATION_TIME, T.FAULT_TIME AS FAULT_TIME, T.ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE AS ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE, T.ROOT_CAUSE_CODE AS ROOT_CAUSE_CODE, T.ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN AS ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN, T.TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT AS TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT, T.STATUS AS STATUS, T.PARENT_TICKET_ID AS PARENT_TICKET_ID, T.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE AS TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE, T.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE AS TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE, T.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_ORIG_DTL_CODE AS TICKET_RCA_RESULT_ORIG_DTL_CODE, T.TICKET_UPDATE_TIME AS TICKET_UPDATE_TIME, T.ZERO1_MODEL AS ZERO1_MODEL, T.ZERO1_ENTROPY AS ZERO1_ENTROPY FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_current T WHERE 1=1 AND T.OCCUR = TRUE AND T.PARENT_TICKET_ID IS NULL AND ticket_generation_time > now() - INTERVAL '48' HOUR ORDER BY ticket_generation_time DESC, ticket_id desc
